'''Draskha''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who paid [[Sienn Sconn]] to steal [[Rythani Products]]' latest [[Rythani Products prototype|prototype]] weapon from [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Caerbellak]]. Draskha's empire began to grow after the death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]] and the beginning of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Easy" />
